title: Omnipotent Narrator
body:
# He's always there...
The narrator is omnipotent. You can't silence him. You can't hide. He's there before text rendering loads, so you'll get some funny boxes when launching Minecraft. You might be able to find a workaround that I just thought of, but we're gonna ignore that part.

## Extra info
Modpacks: You can add this to your modpack as long as it's still hosted on Modrinth. (but only if you're evil)

Ports: Make an issue on [GitHub](https://github.com/skycatminepokie/omnipotent-narrator/issues) to request a version port. I won't port loaders.

Questions? Either make an issue or ping `@skycatminepokie` on the Fabric Development Discord server. Enjoy!
